title: Leptogastrodia putaoensis
taxonomy: Leptogastrodia putaoensis is a rare species of orchid found in Myanmar. It belongs to the family Vandeae and the subfamily Gastrodieae. The genus Leptogastrodia is a small group of orchids, and this species is specifically classified within it. As a member of the family Orchidaceae, Leptogastrodia putaoensis is further categorized as a terrestrial orchid. It is considered endangered due to habitat loss and limited geographic distribution.
